Keep SKILL.md concise; push depth into references/.

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Data / units accuracy fix
- [ ] Interpretation / coaching guidance
- [ ] Skill quality (instructions, structure, links)
- [ ] Tooling / CI / docs
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/validate.py` passes.
- [ ] Relevant `evaluations.md` scenarios still hold (added/updated if behavior changed).
- [ ] `SKILL.md` stays concise; new depth lives in `references/`.
- [ ] No personal data, secrets, or time-sensitive claims.
- [ ] Training-science changes cite a source (below).
- [ ] If what the plugin ships changed, bumped `version` in **both**
      `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` and the matching `marketplace.json` entry.

## Sources

<!-- Required for interpretation/coaching changes; otherwise "n/a". -->
